description_long: This parking meter features a rounded, glossy black head with a deep concave face, mounted atop a slender, slightly curved vertical post. The head is smooth and reflective, with a graffiti-style white tag visible on one side, adding an urban, vandalized character. The post appears to be made of metal and is attached to a wide, circular base that provides stability. The front of the meter displays a recessed area, likely for a payment interface, though no clear coin slot or digital display is visible. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, with a focus on durability and resistance to tampering. The meter's surfaces are hard and sleek, with a high-gloss finish that reflects surrounding light and objects.
description: A modern, glossy black parking meter with a rounded head, graffiti on one side, and a sturdy metal post on a circular base. The front features a recessed area, but no clear payment interface is visible.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glossy, concave face of the meter with a recessed area, possibly for payment, and the sturdy post and base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved profile of the head and the smooth, reflective surface, with the post and base visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the head, the attachment point to the post, and the full length of the mounting post.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the graffiti tag on the head and the curvature of the post and base.
attribute_mounting_post: A single, sturdy, slightly curved metal post with a matte gray finish, connecting the circular base to the head of the meter.
